scripts.dev: npm run dev -w backend & npm run dev -w frontend
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.verify:release: npm run build -w backend && npm run test --prefix backend -- --runInBand && npm run lint --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend
